title: Run /devmeta:reflect 1.1
description:
## Objective
Invoke the full I&A skill for iteration 1.1. The skill handles code review, docs audit, gap verification, project-history update, and plan reassessment internally — do NOT break it into sub-tasks.

## Implementation
1. Confirm on course-main with a clean working tree
2. Invoke skill: /devmeta:reflect 1.1
3. Follow the skill through to completion

## Tests
Skill exits cleanly with all 12 steps done.
Do NOT close until skill completes.
